title: Add a Playwright smoke test
description: Browser smoke test via the Playwright MCP/CI: load the app, assert the WebGL canvas renders, open the panel, switch a preset, and move the points slider. Guards the Three.js/DOM glue that unit tests don't cover.

title: Persist scene to URL and localStorage
description: Serialize transforms + settings (numPoints, colorMode, showGuides) into the URL hash and/or localStorage so a fractal can be shared or restored on reload. Add a pure encode/decode module under src/app with unit tests.

title: Add a color-mode legend overlay
description: Show a small legend/scale for the active color mode (e.g. the height/radius gradient or the per-transform swatches) so the coloring is interpretable. Lives in the app/ui layer.

title: Keyboard shortcuts and accessibility pass
description: Keyboard control for camera/transform editing, focus management for the panel, ARIA on controls, and reduced-motion handling. The panel buttons already carry aria-labels; build on that.

title: Export the fractal as a PNG image
description: Add a button to capture the current view (renderer.domElement.toDataURL) and download it, for sharing renders. Consider a higher-resolution offscreen render.

title: Move the chaos game to a Web Worker
description: Offload runChaosGame + buildColors to a Web Worker (transferable Float32Arrays) so large point counts (up to 500k) don't block the main thread. The pure src/fractal core is already worker-friendly.

title: Add more IFS presets
description: Extend src/fractal/presets.ts with additional named systems (e.g. Barnsley-style fern, Vicsek/cross, dragon curve in 3D) plus buttons in the panel. Pure additions with unit tests for counts/shape.
